title: Aureline glossary pack item authoring artifact
description: Boundary schema for the glossary pack item authoring artifact frozen in docs/ux/learning_artifact_object_model.md. One glossary_pack_item_artifact record per glossary term in a glossary pack. The record is the portable authoring object pack authors ship; the runtime guided_surface_state_record on schemas/ux/guided_surface_state.schema.json carries the render-time state for a glossary card and resolves against this artifact by id. The contract mints no new docs_citation_anchor, source_class, derivation, reuse_surface, freshness_class, deployment_profile_id, or redaction_class vocabulary; those re-export verbatim from schemas/docs/citation_anchor.schema.json, schemas/ux/guided_surface_state.schema.json, schemas/ux/guided_tour.schema.json, schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json, and artifacts/governance/deployment_profiles.yaml. Adding a new jargon_level_class, privacy_scope_class, target_ref_kind, or denial_reason is additive-minor and bumps glossary_pack_item_artifact_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row. Raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw glossary bodies, raw prompt / completion text, and raw credential material never cross this boundary; this schema carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, short privacy-safe labels, and typed policy / redaction metadata only.

glossary_pack_item_artifact_schema_versi.description: Integer schema version for this glossary-pack-item artifact vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries this kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / portable profile packages / support bundles. Raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw glossary bodies, and raw credential material never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

short_label_text.description: Short privacy-safe label text. MUST NOT embed raw paths, raw URLs, raw secret material, or raw AI prompt / completion text.

definition_summary_text.description: Short privacy-safe definition summary. The authoritative full body lives in the docs pack the primary citation anchor resolves against; this field is the bounded glossary-card body. Raw URLs, raw paths, raw secrets, and raw prompt / completion text are forbidden.

bcp47_locale_tag.description: BCP-47 language tag. Re-exported from schemas/docs/citation_anchor.schema.json without modification.

privacy_scope_class.description: Closed privacy-scope vocabulary. See §2.1. profile_portable artifacts MUST be admissible on individual_local, self_hosted, or enterprise_online deployment profiles.

derivation_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/citation_anchor.schema.json derivation without modification. derived and derived_with_upstream_anchors require non-empty upstream_citation_anchor_refs.

policy_context.description: Policy context this artifact was minted under. Re-exported from schemas/docs/citation_anchor.schema.json.

denial_reason.description: Closed denial-reason set publishers MUST emit when a glossary-pack-item artifact would otherwise carry inconsistent state. See §11.

pack_ref.description: Opaque pin to the glossary pack manifest the item ships in.

pack_revision_ref.description: Opaque pin to the pack revision so a reviewer can reconstruct the as-shipped state.

primary_docs_citation_anchor_ref.description: Opaque pin to the docs_citation_anchor_record that authoritatively backs this glossary entry. The cited anchor MUST list one of onboarding, glossary_card, ai_explanation_overlay, docs_pane, or hosted_review_evidence on its reuse_surfaces (see §4 rule 3).

upstream_citation_anchor_refs.description: Required (non-empty) when derivation_class is derived or derived_with_upstream_anchors; empty otherwise.

related_command_id_refs.description: Optional opaque pins to canonical command_ids on the registry the term relates to. Glossary surfaces MAY render these as 'see also' chips that resolve through the command palette rather than minting a private verb.

related_symbol_linked_reference_refs.description: Optional opaque pins to symbol_linked_reference ids the term relates to.

related_layout_target_class.description: Optional canonical layout target where the term concept is most-naturally taught. Raw coordinates are forbidden.

allOf.description: derivation_class = primary forbids upstream_citation_anchor_refs; derived classes require at least one entry.
profile_portable privacy scope MUST be admissible on individual_local, self_hosted, or enterprise_online deployment profiles.

glossary_pack_item_artifact.description: One glossary pack item authoring artifact. See docs/ux/learning_artifact_object_model.md §1.1.
